sentences.text: The wife said, 'You have such a good heart because you always think about other people.'
She reminded him to take the big basket for the flowers.
The Miller tied the windmill's sails with a strong iron chain and went down the hill with the basket.
'Good morning, little Hans,' said the Miller when he saw him.
